messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: Can't log in after enabling 2FA

I turned on two-factor authentication yesterday and now every code from my authenticator app is rejected. I've tried re-syncing the clock on my phone. I'm locked out of all my boards.

response.content: {"category":"account_access","priority":"high","sentiment":"negative","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about account access — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
